inputs.label: Current Traditional IRA Balance
inputs.businessContext: Total pre-tax balance in traditional IRA account before conversion.

label_i18n.fr: Solde actuel du compte IRA traditionnel
label_i18n.es: Saldo actual de la IRA tradicional

businessContext_i18n.en: Total pre-tax balance in traditional IRA account before conversion.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm öncesi geleneksel IRA hesabındaki toplam vergi öncesi bakiye.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter Vorsteuer-Saldo im traditionellen IRA-Konto vor der Umwandlung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Solde total avant impôt du compte IRA traditionnel avant la conversion.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo total antes de impuestos en la cuenta IRA tradicional antes de la conversión.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي الرصيد قبل الضريبة في حساب IRA التقليدي قبل التحويل.

inputs.label: Amount to Convert
inputs.businessContext: Portion of the traditional IRA balance to convert to a Roth IRA; cannot exceed currentBalance.

businessContext_i18n.en: Portion of the traditional IRA balance to convert to a Roth IRA; cannot exceed currentBalance.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Roth IRA'ya dönüştürülecek geleneksel IRA bakiyesinin kısmı; currentBalance değerini aşamaz.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anteil des traditionellen IRA-Saldos, der in eine Roth IRA umgewandelt werden soll; darf currentBalance nicht überschreiten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Partie du solde IRA traditionnel à convertir en Roth IRA ; ne peut pas dépasser le solde actuel.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porción del saldo de la IRA tradicional a convertir a una IRA Roth; no puede exceder el saldo actual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: جزء من رصيد IRA التقليدي لتحويله إلى Roth IRA؛ لا يمكن أن يتجاوز currentBalance.

inputs.label: Current Marginal Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected income tax rate in the year of conversion, expressed as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected income tax rate in the year of conversion, expressed as a percentage.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dönüşüm yılında beklenen gelir vergisi oranı, yüzde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwarteter Einkommensteuersatz im Jahr der Umwandlung, ausgedrückt als Prozentsatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition sur le revenu attendu pour l'année de la conversion, exprimé en pourcentage.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto sobre la renta esperada en el año de la conversión, expresada como porcentaje.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل ضريبة الدخل المتوقع في سنة التحويل، معبرًا عنه كنسبة مئوية.

inputs.label: Expected Retirement Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Estimated marginal tax rate during retirement when traditional IRA withdrawals will be taxed.

label_i18n.fr: Taux d'imposition attendu à la retraite
label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto esperada en la jubilación

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated marginal tax rate during retirement when traditional IRA withdrawals will be taxed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geleneksel IRA'dan çekimlerin vergilendirileceği emeklilik döneminde tahmini marjinal vergi oranı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Geschätzter Grenzsteuersatz während des Ruhestands, wenn Abhebungen aus der traditionellen IRA besteuert werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux marginal d'imposition estimé pendant la retraite, lorsque les retraits du compte IRA traditionnel seront imposés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa marginal de impuesto estimada durante la jubilación, cuando se graven los retiros de la IRA tradicional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الضريبة الهامشي المقدر أثناء التقاعد عندما يتم فرض ضريبة على سحوبات IRA التقليدي.

inputs.label: Years to Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Number of years until retirement, during which converted funds grow tax-free.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years until retirement, during which converted funds grow tax-free.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emekliliğe kalan yıl sayısı, bu süre boyunca dönüştürülen fonlar vergisiz büyür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre bis zum Ruhestand, in denen die umgewandelten Mittel steuerfrei wachsen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années avant la retraite, pendant lesquelles les fonds convertis croissent en franchise d'impôt.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años hasta la jubilación, durante los cuales los fondos convertidos crecen libres de impuestos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد السنوات حتى التقاعد، حيث تنمو الأموال المحولة معفاة من الضرائب.

inputs.label: Expected Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Assumed average annual investment return before inflation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Assumed average annual investment return before inflation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enflasyon öncesi varsayılan ortalama yıllık yatırım getirisi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Angenommene durchschnittliche jährliche Kapitalrendite vor Inflation.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement annuel moyen attendu avant inflation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de rendimiento anual promedio asumida antes de la inflación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: متوسط العائد السنوي على الاستثمار المفترض قبل التضخم.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
